no: Install before SR and TotLM if using IWD spells. Based on the IWD-in-BG2 conversion project.

conflicts.reason: Managed conflict — crosslinked shared code with mutual REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT MOD_IS_INSTALLED detection. Spell table 2DA files are byte-identical. Whichever installs first wins; the other auto-skips. Note: IWDification cn values for spell tables are 150/160/170 (DESIGNATED), NOT 2270/2390/2400 (those are cdtweaks cn values). No overlapping components selected .
conflicts.myComps: #10 Casting Graphics #20 Drab Colors #150 Bard Spells #160 Paladin Spells #170 Ranger Spells
conflicts.theirComps: #70 Casting Graphics #100 Drab Colors #2270 Bard Spells #2390 Paladin Spells #2400 Ranger Spells
conflicts.source: Crosslinked code headers; REQUIRE_PREDICATE at IWDification tp2 lines 92/107/680/918/963; cdtweaks tp2 lines 2843/2873, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: IWDification cn:70 (IWD Shapeshifting) conflicts with HouseTweaks cn:2 (Expanded Shapeshifting) — both overhaul druid wild shape forms and CLAB tables. Choose one. IWDification cn:70, HouseTweaks cn:2 IS selected. No conflict. Original entry incorrectly listed cn:130 (Damage Animations) which is unrelated to shapeshifting.
conflicts.source: IWDification cn:70 modifies CLABDR01/04 + shapeshifting spells; HT wildshape.tpa does same; cn:130 is damage animations (no overlap), 2026-04

conflicts.reason: IWDification cn:50 (IWD Bard Songs) and cn:150 (Bard Spell Progression) overlap with M&G cn:400 (Bard Overhaul). Both modify bard CLAB and song tables. IWDification cn:50 and cn:150 No conflict.
conflicts.myComps: #50 IWD Bard Songs #150 Bard Spell Progression (neither in Ultimate preset)

conflicts.reason: IWDification cn:30 (IWD Arcane Spells) overlaps with MiH SP cn:1 (IWD Arcane Spellpack — same CamDawg/DavidW codebase). IWDification cn:40 (IWD Divine Spells) overlaps with MiH SP cn:3 (IWD Divine Spellpack). IWDification cn:50 (Bard Songs) overlaps with MiH SP cn:8 (Revised Bard Powers). IWDification cn:30/40/50 all MiH SP cn:0 (MiH Arcane, different from IWD arcane) IS selected. No conflict.
conflicts.myComps: #30 IWD Arcane #40 IWD Divine #50 Bard Songs (none in Ultimate preset)
conflicts.theirComps: #1 IWD Arcane Spellpack #3 IWD Divine Spellpack #8 Revised Bard Powers
conflicts.source: MiH SP cn:1/3 are CamDawg/DavidW IWD spell ports (same as IWDification cn:30/40); cn:0 is MiH original arcane spells (different), 2026-04

conflicts.reason: SCS cn:1500/1510 (IWD Arcane/Divine Spells) and cn:1520 (IWD Bard Songs) are the SAME IWD spell imports as IWDification cn:30/40/50. SCS spell tweaks (cn:2000-2080) modify spells that IWDification also adds. SCS has built-in detection for IWDification. IWDification cn:30/40/50 SCS cn:1500/1510/1520 (ToF provides IWD spells instead). No conflict.
conflicts.myComps: #30 IWD Arcane #40 IWD Divine #50 IWD Bard Songs (none in Ultimate preset)
conflicts.theirComps: #1500 IWD Arcane #1510 IWD Divine #1520 IWD Bard Songs #2000-#2080 Spell tweaks
conflicts.source: SCS/IWDification/MiH SP all share CamDawg/DavidW IWD spell codebase; SCS detects IWDification, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: IWDification cn:30/40/50 (IWD spell packs) conflict with TotLM cn:10 (also adds IWD spells). Different spell implementations can't coexist. IWDification cn:30/40/50 No conflict.
conflicts.myComps: #30 IWD Arcane #40 IWD Divine #50 IWD Bard Songs (none in Ultimate preset)

conflicts.reason: IWDification cn:160 (Paladin IWD Spell Progression) and cn:170 (Ranger IWD Spell Progression) overlap with Selphira cn:22/23 — both modify mxsplpal.2da/mxsplran.2da. IWDification cn:160/170 No conflict.
conflicts.myComps: #160 Paladin Spell Progression #170 Ranger Spell Progression (neither in Ultimate preset)

conflicts.reason: ZGT cn:101 (Ranger spells for Cleric-Ranger) grants ranger spell slots to multiclass. Only interacts with IWDification cn:170 (Ranger IWD Spell Progression) which modifies mxsplran.2da. IWDification cn:170 ZGT cn:101 IS selected but safe since it modifies cleric-ranger CLAB, not the ranger spell table itself. No conflict.
conflicts.myComps: #170 Ranger Spell Progression (NOT in Ultimate preset)
conflicts.source: ZGT cn:101 modifies cleric-ranger CLAB to add ranger spell access; IWDification cn:170 replaces mxsplran.2da; different mechanisms, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: ToF cn:1500/1510/1520 (IWD spell imports) are the SAME CamDawg/DavidW IWD spell codebase as IWDification cn:30/40/50. ToF cn:40200 (IWD Paladins) and cn:40400 (Ranger Spells) overlap with IWDification cn:160/170. Redundant — use one source for IWD spells, not both. IWDification cn:30/40/50/160/170 all ToF cn:1500/1510/1520/40200/40400 ARE selected as the IWD spell source. No conflict — ToF is the chosen provider.
conflicts.myComps: #30 IWD Arcane #40 IWD Divine #50 Bard Songs #160 Paladin Spells #170 Ranger Spells (none in Ultimate preset)
conflicts.theirComps: #1500 IWD Arcane #1510 IWD Divine #1520 IWD Bard Songs #40200 IWD Paladins #40400 Ranger Spells
conflicts.source: All share CamDawg/DavidW IWD spell ports; Ultimate preset uses ToF as single IWD spell source, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Both add IWD spells. NWNForBG detects existing spells and skips duplicates. Install NWNForBG after IWDification to use IWDification spell versions.

new: +2 DEX for 1 hour. Stacks with other buffs.
Creates a quarterstaff that deals 2d3 magic damage.
Ice lance deals 5d6 cold + stun 1 round. Save negates stun.
Cone of force deals 5d4+2/level magic damage.
Target's blood boils: 3d2 fire +3d2 magic/round for 3 rounds.
Enemies flee in terror. Save negates.
1d4+1 missiles dealing 2d4 magic each. No save.
Summons 2 shadow monsters to fight for caster.
Cone of sound deals 2d6 damage, deafens targets.
Acid sphere deals 4d4 + 1d4/round residual for 4 rounds.
Target surrounded by flames, 2d6 fire/round for 5 rounds.
Summons 2 shadows to fight for the caster.
Caster immune to all magic but cannot cast spells.
3 bone darts each dealing 2d8 magic + 2d8 piercing.
6d6 cold in 15ft radius or single-target missile.
Summons a soul eater that level-drains enemies.
Acid rain deals 1d6/round for 5 rounds in area.
3 ice strikes each dealing 2d6 cold + stun.
Creates +4 force blade with extra APR.
Target takes 2d6 crushing/round and slowed. Save negates.
DR 50%, immune critical/backstab, STR 25. Cannot cast.
Immune to all mind-affecting for 1 day.
Ranged attack deals 1d6+1/2 levels magic damage.
Cold rain deals 2d8+1/level. Save for half.
Removes fatigue, fear, and mental effects.
Touch deals 1d6+1/level poison. Save for half.
Target gains +2 STR/CON, -2 AC. Attacks nearest.
Allies +2 THAC0/saves, enemies -2. Better than Prayer.
Target immune to fatigue, +1 HP/round regen.
Undead take 2d6/round in wall. Others unaffected.
Target goes berserk: +2 THAC0/damage, attacks all.
All enemies in area take 8 damage.
Wind column deals 2d6 crush/round, pushes enemies.
Save vs Death or die. If saved, 10d6 damage.
Immune to all mental attacks. 1 turn.
All in area become hopeless. Save negates.
All in area suffer -2 attacks/saves from pain.

ki.description: IWDification Smite Evil ability works on all creatures, not just evil-aligned ones. Confirmed bug reported by Aedwyr (Sept 2025), acknowledged by CamDawg (March 2026).
ki.workaround: No fix available yet. Smite Evil will deal bonus damage to all targets regardless of alignment.

ki.description: IWDification Tracking component does not have WeiDU LABELs. Reported by Dan_P (Oct 2025), acknowledged by CamDawg (March 2026). May affect mod installers that use LABEL-based detection (e.g., Project Infinity).
ki.workaround: No workaround needed for manual installs. PI users may see the component as undetected.

ki.description: Installing IWD Spell components corrupts bgee.lua on Chinese game versions. Reported by MephistoSatanDevil (Sept 2025), acknowledged by CamDawg (March 2026). Locale-specific encoding issue.
ki.workaround: Chinese users should back up bgee.lua before installing IWD spell components and restore if corrupted.

ki.description: IWDification Paladin Protection from Evil has 24-hour duration, while IWDEE original is 24 turns. Unclear if intentional or a bug. Reported by Melcar (April 2026), no reply yet.
IWDification v11 winter wolf and boring beetle shapeshifting forms are incorrectly hasted. Reported by Dan_P (Aug 2025), no reply yet.

IWDification bundles an older SFO library that fails GLR-parsing ALTER_SCRIPT.TPH line 548 col 1-25 under WeiDU 25201+ (parser grammar change). Blocks most item-pack and damage-animation components that call ALTER_SCRIPT. Same root cause as mih_fr/mih_sp failures.
ki.workaround: Use WeiDU <= 25200, or wait for IWDification to ship an updated SFO. Skip affected components in the meantime.

sum: Brings IWD elements into BG2: 65+ new spells, casting graphics, two-handed axes, polymorph, class updates, and visual tweaks.

co.n: Icewind Dale Casting Graphics (Andyr)
co.no: Replaces EE casting animations with IWD-style. Also done by cdtweaks #70
co.tp2n: Icewind Dale Casting Graphics (Andyr)

co.n: Commoners Use Drab Colors
co.no: Gives commoners drab-colored clothing. Also done by cdtweaks #100
co.tp2n: Commoners Use Drab Colors

co.n: Two-Handed Axe Item Pack
co.tp2n: Two-Handed Axe Item Pack

co.n: Expanded Polymorph Self
co.no: Adds IWD polymorph forms to Polymorph Self spell. Conflicts with JTweaks shapeshift corrections and SCS/ToF shapeshift changes
co.tp2n: Expanded Polymorph Self

co.n: Use IWD Damage Animations
co.tp2n: Use IWD Damage Animations

co.n: Add High Quality Items
co.tp2n: Add High Quality Items

co.n: Do Not Add High Quality Items
co.no: Skip high-quality items if using Item Revisions or other item overhauls
co.tp2n: Do Not Add High Quality Items

co.n: Increase Spear Damage
co.tp2n: Increase Spear Damage

co.n: IWD Class Updates: Bard: Add IWD Bard Songs
co.no: Adds War Chant of Sith, The Ballad of Three Heroes, and other IWD bard songs. Overlaps with MiH Spell Pack's Bard Powers. INSTALL ISSUE: CLABclass_clab_CLFDBARD01.2da not found. IWDification Bard Songs reads kitlist.2da to enumerate all bard kits and processes each CLAB file. CLFDBARD is a bard kit from Cliffette's History; its CLAB (CLABclass_clab_CLFDBARD01.2da) is referenced in kitlist.2da but the file is missing from override, likely because Cliffette's History failed or was not installed. Also cascades from RR bard component failures (cn=4,5) if RR was expected to set up bard CLAB tables. Ensure all bard kit mods install successfully before IWDification Bard Songs.
co.tp2n: Bard Class Update: Add IWD Bard Songs

co.n: IWD Class Updates: Bard: Selectable Bard Songs for Jesters and Skalds
co.no: Allows Jesters and Skalds to choose their bard song instead of being locked to their kit song.
co.tp2n: Bard Class Update: Selectable Bard Songs for Jesters and Skalds

co.n: IWD Class Updates: Bard: Use IWD Spell Progression
co.no: Gives bards IWD spell progression. Also done by cdtweaks and ToF
co.tp2n: Bard Class Update: Use IWD Spell Progression

co.n: IWD Class Updates: Druid: Use IWD Shapeshifting and Ability Progression

co.tp2n: Druid Class Update: Use IWD Shapeshifting and Ability Progression

co.n: IWD Class Updates: Druid: Allow Elves to be Druids
co.tp2n: Druid Class Update: Allow Elves to be Druids

co.no: Adds Ranger tracking ability from IWD. Also done by cdtweaks #3390 and METweaks #1200

advisories.reason: IWDification cn:40 (IWD Divine Spells) adds priest spells that FnP cn:75 may need to categorize into spheres. Install IWDification before FnP. IWDification cn:40 No conflict.
advisories.myComps: #40 IWD Divine Spells (NOT in Ultimate preset)
